---
id: retrieve-a-ledger
title: "Retrieve a Ledger"
description: "The single ledger endpoint provides information on a specific [ledger](https://developers.stellar.org/docs/learn/fundamentals/stellar-data-structures/ledgers)."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve a Ledger"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/ledgers/{sequence}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The single ledger endpoint provides information on a specific [ledger](https://developers.stellar.org/docs/learn/fundamentals/stellar-data-structures/ledgers).
